name: Green Chili with Pork
recipeIngredient: 5 cups Chicken stock or canned broth
3 fresh stemmed and minced green chilies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy duty casserole or Dutch oven (about 5 qt.), warm the oil over medium heat.
2. Add onions, garlic, jalapenos, and carrots. Cook, stirring once or twice, for 10 minutes.
3. Stir in oregano and pork cubes. Cook until pork has lost its pink color, about 20 minutes. Stir occasionally.
4. Stir in chicken stock, 1 tsp salt, crushed tomatoes, and grated potato. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat and partially cover. Cook for 1 1/2 hours, stirring occasionally.
5. Cut poblano into 1-inch strips. Add them to the chili and cook, stirring often, for another 30 to 45 minutes or until pork is tender and chili thickens to your liking.
6. Taste for correct seasonings and let cook another 5 minutes. Serve hot.
